testcase.name: Status code is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 85817c31-d92b-4b70-9e90-7104c9c94c9d. Collection name: Core Business API Tests - Lab04. Request name: 01_Functional / Get Policy By ID. Test description: Status code is 200. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:3).

testcase.name: Response has policyId
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 85817c31-d92b-4b70-9e90-7104c9c94c9d. Collection name: Core Business API Tests - Lab04. Request name: 01_Functional / Get Policy By ID. testcase.name: Status code is 401 or 403
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 85817c31-d92b-4b70-9e90-7104c9c94c9d. Collection name: Core Business API Tests - Lab04. Request name: 02_Auth / Missing Token - Should return 401. Test description: Status code is 401 or 403. Error message: expected [ 401, 403 ] to include 200. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 401, 403 ] to include 200 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:5).

testcase.name: Status code is 401 or 403
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 85817c31-d92b-4b70-9e90-7104c9c94c9d. Collection name: Core Business API Tests - Lab04. Request name: 02_Auth / Invalid Token - Should return 401. Test description: Status code is 401 or 403. Error message: expected [ 401, 403 ] to include 200. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 401, 403 ] to include 200 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:6).

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / Long cardId - Test boundary (51 chars should fail)

testcase.name: Status code is 422 for boundary violation

testsuite.name: 05_Consumer_side_Smoke / Call AI Vision Mock - Smoke Test
